response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, but her resume lacks direct experience with C programming, embedded systems, Linux kernel modification, or security features relevant to the role. Her background is heavily weighted toward web and backend development (Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript) and high-level systems, with no mention of networking, switch technologies, or security protocols like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. Additionally, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency.
strengths: Strong software development background with diverse experience in multiple programming languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in collaborative, cross-functional teams and deliver high-quality solutions
Experience with open-source projects and system-level development (D, C++)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX or embedded systems
Lacks relevant experience in network security, switching technologies, or security protocols
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or embedded firmware development
